name: chr20_20q13_12_HNF4A_SD
description: 20q13.12 SD region containing HNF4A (MODY1 / maturity-onset diabetes of the young gene), R3HDML and TOX2. Flanked by short SD blocks of ~10-30 kb at 93-96% identity.

architecture.internal_structure: Short 10-30 kb intra-chromosomal SDs at 93-96% identity flanking HNF4A; partial inter-chromosomal SDs to HNF1A region on chr12.
